economic_notes: Investments include Tyee Building Supplies LP, Gitxaala Horizon North Services LP, North Coast Skeena CFE, North-Co-Corp Ferry Services Ltd. Nation has 60% partnership share in HaiSea LP and owns all issued share capital of Gitxaala Forest Products Ltd (both inactive). Kitkatla Development Corporation carrying value is nil. Guarantor on RBC loan for Tyee Building Supplies LP ($2,502,000) and Coast Industrial Construction Partnership ($13,500,000). Provincial Coastal and LNG Benefit Agreements surplus of $44,593,794 planned for base funding, cultural centre, economic development, employment/training, ferry service, and implementation.
notes: Cash held in lawyer trusts ($35,908,818) is being held for future expenditures. Cash includes $20,273,387 restricted to Gitxaala Legacy Trust managed by independently appointed Trustees. Prior year (2020) revenue was significantly higher ($62,962,715) due to $13,000,000 Grant from sale of Ridley Terminal and higher Province of BC revenue ($29,377,119). Provincial Coastal and LNG Benefit Agreements expenditure of $2,492,647 appears as new expense category in 2021 with no budget. Segment disclosure note 14 references a table that does not appear in the provided pages. Scheduled principal repayments over 5 years total $304,713 but remaining balance ($382,581 - $304,713 = $77,868) not explained. Investments grew significantly from $2,560,432 to $14,481,211 primarily due to new $9,826,078 contribution to Gitxaala Horizon North Services LP.
